visual_notes: subtle earth palette with sand, stone, charcoal, olive, and wood tones

assets.alt: Premium modern home exterior with warm daylight and landscaped entry
assets.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: landing page hero
Primary request: wide editorial photo of a premium Nairobi-adjacent family home exterior for a real estate lead generation website
Scene/backdrop: upscale residential compound with lush but controlled landscaping, clean driveway, warm stone and wood finishes, believable gated neighborhood atmosphere
Subject: modern home exterior with strong curb appeal and realistic architectural proportions
Style/medium: premium editorial real estate photography
Composition/framing: wide composition with generous negative space for headline and CTA overlay, card-safe crop for desktop and mobile
Lighting/mood: soft golden daylight, calm and trustworthy mood, subtle depth
Color palette: sand, stone, charcoal, olive, warm wood
Materials/textures: real stone, glass, wood, concrete, trimmed greenery
Constraints: no text, no logos, no signage, no watermark, no people, no distorted lines, no exaggerated mansion tropes

assets.alt: Detached villa exterior in a green upscale neighborhood
assets.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: featured listing cover
Primary request: editorial exterior photo of a large detached villa in a leafy upscale Nairobi-inspired neighborhood
Scene/backdrop: gated residential setting with mature greenery, tidy compound, premium but believable surroundings
Subject: detached villa exterior with tasteful architecture and elegant landscaping
Style/medium: premium editorial real estate photography
Composition/framing: strong single-subject frame optimized for listing cards and featured sections
Lighting/mood: warm daylight with soft shadows, inviting and trustworthy
Color palette: stone, beige, olive, charcoal, natural greens
Materials/textures: stucco, stone, glass, metal gate details, trimmed lawn
Constraints: no text, no signage, no logos, no watermark, no people, no impossible geometry

assets.alt: Refined property-owner CTA image with keys, tablet, and residential context
assets.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: website support section image
Primary request: refined editorial image for a real estate property-owner call-to-action section encouraging owners to list their property
Scene/backdrop: elegant residential tabletop or home entry context with subtle architectural cues nearby
Subject: a tasteful arrangement of house keys, tablet or clipboard, and real estate paperwork without readable text, designed to feel trustworthy rather than stock-corporate
Style/medium: premium editorial still-life photography
Composition/framing: section-banner friendly composition with clean negative space for UI and CTA copy
Lighting/mood: soft natural daylight, calm, professional, credible
Color palette: sand, cream, charcoal, olive accents, warm wood
Materials/textures: brushed metal keys, linen or paper texture, wood, stone, matte tablet surface
Constraints: no readable text, no logos, no watermark, no people, no cheesy sales staging, no unrealistic prop layout
